utcDay: Sunday UTC day begins Saturday 2026-06-20 at 20:00 EDT

sources.label: CWops Solid Copy No. 193, February 2026, W8WZ “Activating DC”
sources.notes: Article describes the LBJ 7-fer, the 4-fer fallback at Columbia Island Marina/picnic tables, and the 15-park Cheetah route completed on 2025-12-22.

sources.label: OpenStreetMap/Nominatim GeoJSON attempts
sources.notes: Physical park polygons were found for the main Mall/DC/VA stops. Trail GeoJSON is incomplete or low-confidence and still needs exact-position verification.

sources.label: Imported n-fer evidence from top activators

countingNotes: Count unique POTA entities on the Sunday UTC day, not local calendar day.
Fort McHenry at/after 20:00 EDT Saturday is part of the Sunday UTC rove count.
Trail references require operating within the POTA trail rule and on public land; imported n-fer data is evidence, not boundary proof.

The LBJ exact 7-fer operating point is approximate until confirmed on imagery/GPS: from Columbia Island Marina parking, walk to the LBJ stone monument, continue toward the Washington Monument, cross the parkway, and set up under a tree between the parkway and the Potomac as described by W8WZ.

timelineAssumptions.notes: Timeline is a planning model, not a schedule commitment. Use 45 minutes per activation stop for planning, with 30 minutes as the absolute floor if the day needs to compress.

primaryTimeline.movementFromPrior: Saturday route arrival; target on site by ~19:30
primaryTimeline.timelineNote: Opens the Sunday UTC day. Do not start before 20:00 EDT if the goal is Sunday UTC credit.
Sunday morning jackpot stop. Use rideshare from the hotel; Columbia Island Marina is only access context, not a car stop.
Adds FDR and National Mall if National Mall has not already been counted. Walking from LBJ is about 29 minutes; rideshare is about 7 minutes.
Short Mall walk; National Mall is already duplicate after FDR.
Adds Lincoln while it is only a short west Mall walk; skip only if crowds or operating space are bad.
Cheetah threshold if Fort McHenry and LBJ verify as planned.
End of the W8WZ article-backed Mall sequence.

primaryTimeline.label: Return to Foggy Bottom hotel / get car
primaryTimeline.timelineNote: Walk back to the hotel to pick up the car. Rideshare is about 9 minutes if schedule or weather makes the walk unattractive.
Clean Ostrich finish if park/refuge access and antenna restrictions check out. This assumes the car stays at the hotel during the DC rove.

primaryTimeline.label: Fredericksburg hotel
primaryTimeline.timelineNote: Booked Sunday night anchor after the rove.

optionalTimelineAddOns.placement: between Washington Monument or Lincoln and Mason Neck
optionalTimelineAddOns.timelineImpact: Adds about 1h 35m before Mason Neck when including the activation and extra driving.
optionalTimelineAddOns.timelineNote: Useful Ostrich buffer if public access and pace are excellent.

operatingStops.timing: Saturday 2026-06-20, arrive ~19:30 EDT, activate at/after 20:00 EDT
operatingStops.name: Fort McHenry National Monument
operatingStops.evidence: Repeated imported top-activator records from KB3WAV and KC3RW show US-0928 + US-4581 + US-4567 + US-4582.
operatingStops.confidence: strong evidence; exact public operating position still needs confirmation

operatingStops.name: LBJ Memorial Grove exact 7-fer position
operatingStops.evidence: CWops/W8WZ article gives walking instructions and reference list; POTA API comments for trails emphasize exact-location verification.
operatingStops.confidence: high if exact tree/overlap point is found; fallback is 4-fer

routeModels.name: Cheetah baseline: Fort + LBJ + Mall through Vietnam
routeModels.totalLabel: about 8h 45m split across Saturday evening and Sunday, before food/parking variance
routeModels.notes: Cheetah threshold is reached at Vietnam if Fort McHenry 4-fer and LBJ 7-fer verify.

routeModels.name: Full W8WZ route plus Fort McHenry
routeModels.totalLabel: about 10h 45m split across Saturday evening and Sunday
routeModels.notes: This mirrors the article sequence and leaves room for one southbound add-on if the day is moving well.

routeModels.name: Ostrich stretch: full route + Lincoln + Mason Neck
routeModels.totalLabel: about 14h 10m split across Saturday evening and Sunday; stretch but plausible with disciplined 45-60 minute stops
routeModels.notes: Mason Neck should be before dusk; this model may need a morning start and no long social pause.

routeModels.name: Ostrich high-confidence buffer: add Dyke Marsh before Mason Neck
routeModels.totalLabel: about 15h 40m split across Saturday evening and Sunday; likely too heavy unless using shorter activations
routeModels.notes: Dyke Marsh adds margin but also pushes Mason Neck later; keep as backup unless exact access and pace are excellent.

mappedLegs.notes: Optional early add-on if chasing 20+ entities.
Primary Sunday morning jump; car remains parked at the hotel.
Use only if Theodore Roosevelt Island is included.
Walking is about 29 minutes; rideshare preserves rove time.

mappedLegs.to: Washington Monument via optimized core Mall walk
mappedLegs.notes: FDR -> MLK -> Korean -> Lincoln -> Vietnam -> Constitution -> WWII -> Washington Monument.
Default low-cost return to the car; rideshare is about 9 minutes.
Use this if the east Mall expansion is attempted; walking back is about 54 minutes.
Southbound car move after returning to the hotel.

openVerification: Confirm the exact LBJ 7-fer tree/overlap point against imagery or with a local activator before relying on all seven references.
Confirm Fort McHenry exact position for US-4582 in addition to US-0928, US-4581, and US-4567.
Confirm Mason Neck NWR operating restrictions: POTA cache says free-standing antennas only, no vegetation attachment, no off-trail operating, and no tables in parking areas.
Check closing/dusk times for Mason Neck if using it as the Ostrich add-on.
Decide whether the friend meetup happens inside the rove sequence or after the Cheetah count is already secure.
Pennsylvania Avenue NHS and C&O Canal did not return clean OSM GeoJSON in the first fetch pass; verify boundaries before relying on those as easy add-ons.
Jefferson and Ford resolved as point GeoJSON rather than full polygons; use POTA/NPS context and on-site signage before treating the point as the whole activatable area.

expandedMallInventory.summary: DC cache has 32 references total. For the Foggy Bottom / National Mall rove, the practical inventory is the LBJ trail cluster plus 17 Mall/downtown references; Fort McHenry adds four Sunday-UTC references before the local DC walk begins.

expandedMallRoute.name: Aggressive Mall/downtown expansion from Foggy Bottom
expandedMallRoute.strategy: Rideshare from Foggy Bottom to the exact LBJ operating area, rideshare to FDR or Jefferson, walk the Mall/downtown sequence, then return to the Foggy Bottom hotel to get the car before any southbound add-ons.

mapsChecks.to: Dwight D. Eisenhower Memorial via expanded Mall walk

recommendedOrder: Optional early: Theodore Roosevelt Island by car/rideshare if chasing 20+
Thomas Jefferson Memorial or FDR Memorial rideshare drop
Return to Foggy Bottom hotel, then drive to Mason Neck

countMilestones.label: After Jefferson starts the Mall overlay

expandedMallRoute.caution: The optimized expanded downtown walk is about 8.2 km / 112 minutes from Jefferson through Eisenhower before activation time. If you push east, plan a rideshare back to the Foggy Bottom hotel; walking back from Eisenhower is about 54 minutes.

routeOptimization.summary: With the car parked at the Foggy Bottom hotel, the best structure is hotel-anchored: rideshare to the LBJ operating area, rideshare to the Mall, walk the dense memorial sequence, return to the hotel to get the car, then drive south. Columbia Island Marina is access context for LBJ, not a stop.
constraints: The Tesla stays parked at the Foggy Bottom hotel during the DC rove.
Prefer walking when the time penalty is modest and it avoids another rideshare.
Use rideshare for the hotel -> LBJ and LBJ -> Mall jumps; those crossings are not worth walking during a count-focused rove.
Return to the hotel before Mason Neck, because the southbound car move starts there.

recommendedCoreOrder.label: Foggy Bottom hotel
recommendedCoreOrder.movement: start with car parked at hotel

recommendedCoreOrder.label: Optional Theodore Roosevelt Island
recommendedCoreOrder.movement: 4 min from hotel; 9 min onward to LBJ
recommendedCoreOrder.value: +1 entity, but costs an extra early stop/ride

recommendedCoreOrder.label: LBJ exact 7-fer operating area
recommendedCoreOrder.value: +5 unique after Fort McHenry, 7 refs total at the spot

recommendedCoreOrder.label: FDR rideshare drop / Mall start
recommendedCoreOrder.movement: about 7 min from LBJ; walking is about 29 min

recommendedCoreOrder.label: FDR -> MLK -> Korean -> Lincoln -> Vietnam -> Constitution -> WWII -> Washington Monument
recommendedCoreOrder.movement: about 2.9 km / 39 min for this core sequence from FDR
recommendedCoreOrder.value: reaches 18 entities after Washington Monument if Fort/LBJ validate

recommendedCoreOrder.label: Return to Foggy Bottom hotel
recommendedCoreOrder.movement: 31 min walk or about 9 min rideshare from Washington Monument

addOnFindings.label: Theodore Roosevelt Island
addOnFindings.finding: Only do it before LBJ if chasing 20+. Walking hotel -> TR -> LBJ is about 88 minutes; rideshare movement is about 13 minutes before activation time.

addOnFindings.label: LBJ to FDR
addOnFindings.finding: Treat this as a rideshare jump. Walking is about 29 minutes; rideshare/driving directions are about 7 minutes.

addOnFindings.label: Return to hotel
addOnFindings.finding: After the Washington Monument core finish, walking back to Foggy Bottom is about 31 minutes; rideshare is about 9 minutes. Either way, get the car at the hotel before going south.

addOnFindings.label: East Mall expansion
addOnFindings.finding: If you push to Eisenhower, rideshare back to the hotel is about 11 minutes; walking back is about 54 minutes and should not be the default.

addOnFindings.label: Mason Neck
addOnFindings.finding: Keep as the clean southbound finish, but route it from the Foggy Bottom hotel car pickup rather than from the final DC walking stop.
